001package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton;
002
003import com.pathplanner.lib.path.PathPlannerPath;
004import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
005// import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
006import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveResetPose;
007import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.vision.SetVisionDisabled;
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.vision.SetVisionEnabled;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
010import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SequentialCommandGroup;
011
012public class LBMid extends SequentialCommandGroup {
013
014    public LBMid(PathPlannerPath... paths) {
015        addCommands(
016                new SwerveResetPose(paths[0].getStartingHolonomicPose().get()), CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance()
017                        .followPathCommand(paths[0]), /* .alongWith(new IntakeSetIntake()) */
018                new SetVisionDisabled(), CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().followPathCommand(paths[1]),
019                new IntakeSetHomingDown(), new SetVisionEnabled());
020    }
021}
